category_sources: source_facts.description says Web-based viewer for Python profiler output.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub repository use the display name SnakeViz.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SnakeViz documentation links contribution and issue tracking to its GitHub project, and the official repository is https://github.com/jiffyclub/snakeviz.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Python profiler output viewing; official docs describe browser-based cProfile visualization.
